{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Pillar of Sunset
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Pillar of Sunset]] is a column of smoldering red and black stone.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|The [[Pillar of Sunset]] has a red-and-black marbled surface and pulses with living heat.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
